note: Only skill2 needs override. Blk1 (all allies Pierce Damage +18.36% for 5s on full-charge) is kept for fidelity but pierceDamagePct is inert in v1. Blk2 is gated on 'Spy Lens fully stacked' (10 stacks of +4.44% Min Effective Range from full charges, Spy Lens itself is an inert range stat); as an SR that full-charges continuously she reaches and holds 10 stacks after a brief ramp, so the 'ATK +16% continuously' is modeled as an always-on passive self buff (the parser dropped it because the trigger was unsupported). 'Gain Pierce continuously' skipped (pierce inert). skill1 omitted: blk1 (ATK +15.2% of caster ATK to allies on full charge) is parsed faithfully and blk2 Spy Lens (Min Effective Range) is inert. burst omitted: allies Attack Damage +55.04% / Pierce +10.13% parsed faithfully, self Min Effective Range +55.56% is inert.
